testcase.name: test_travel_not_dine_response

failure.message:
Failed: TRAVEL BUG: Mira responded with dine/café content instead of travel. Response: Here are a few places that would suit Lola's comfort.
I can: • check availability • arrange a table • confirm pet policies with the café
Which would you like me to arrange for Lola?...

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_mira_os_voice_audit_211.py:258: in test_travel_not_dine_response pytest.fail( E Failed: TRAVEL BUG: Mira responded with dine/café content instead of travel. E Response: Here are a few places that would suit Lola's comfort. E E I can: E • check availability E • arrange a table E • confirm pet policies with the café E E Which would you like me to arrange for Lola?...

testcase.name: test_icon_state_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Icon state API failed: 401 assert 401 == 200 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_mira_os_voice_audit_211.py:507: in test_icon_state_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Icon state API failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Icon state API failed: 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
